name: Antwerp (Belgium)

colors.symbolism: the historic livery colour of the city of Antwerp, from its medieval coat of arms
the second of Antwerp's livery colours

description: Three horizontal stripes — red, white, red — with the wide white band in the middle (proportions 1:3:1).
history: The red and white are Antwerp's historic livery colours, derived from the city's medieval arms (a castle argent on gules). The same colours appear in the chequered flag of the Province of Antwerp.

features.symbolism: the historic livery colours of the city of Antwerp
